LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.description: Attach two big chemfuel canisters to the bottom of the vehicle to allow it to travel greater distances without the risk of running out of fuel.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.label: big chemtanks
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.description: Increase the amount of cargo that can be hauled by this vehicle, and add two additional passenger slots.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.label: expanded cargo space
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.descriptio: Increase the size of the chemtank slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.label: fuel capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.description: Weld a layer of reinforced steel plating to the vehicle, increasing its armor value at the cost of increasing vehicle mass and lowering acceleration.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.label: reinforced armor
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.description: Replace the tires with deep threaded tires that provide more traction and will allow the vehicle to move significantly faster offroad.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.label: offroad tires
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.description: Elevate the engine to improve its efficiency at the cost of exposing it to damage.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.label: exterior engine
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.description: Improve the cargo capacity of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.label: cargo capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.description: Reinforce the armor of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.label: armor
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.description: Improve the engine of the vehicle, allowing it to reach higher maximum speed.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.label: speed
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.description: Improve shifting capabilities of transmission to increase acceleration speed of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.label: acceleration
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.description: Improve the exhaust system of the vehicle, improving fuel efficiency slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Mule_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.label: fuel consumption
